title: Figure 2 in A one-step multiplex qPCR assay for simultaneous identification and quantification of Leishmania martiniquensis and Leishmania orientalis/Leishmania chancei and detection and quantification of trypanosomatids in clinical samples
author: Mano, Chonlada
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2. Representatives of amplification plots of the singleplex and multiplex qPCR assays and standard curves of the singleplex and multiplex qPCR of L. martiniquensis (A, B, C), L. orientalis (D, E, F, or Crithidia sp. (CLA-KP1) (G, H, I).
steps_raw: Figure 2. Representatives of amplification plots of the singleplex and multiplex qPCR assays and standard curves of the singleplex and multiplex qPCR of L. martiniquensis (A, B, C), L. orientalis (D, E, F, or Crithidia sp. (CLA-KP1) (G, H, I).
